CREATE TABLE test_strings (text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('HELLO WORLD');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('MÜNCHEN');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('12345');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('turkish İğdır');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ẞ and ß');
SELECT lowerUTF8(text) AS LoweredText FROM test_strings;
SELECT lowerUTF8('Turkish İ and i') AS LoweredTurkish;
SELECT lowerUTF8('A B C D E F G H I') AS LoweredABC;
SELECT lowerUTF8('Café') AS LoweredCafe;
SELECT lowerUTF8(CONCAT('TEST', 'ING')) AS LoweredConcat;
SELECT lowerUTF8('HELLO') AS LoweredHello, lowerUTF8('WORLD') AS LoweredWorld FROM test_strings;
SELECT lowerUTF8(text) AS LoweredText FROM (SELECT text FROM test_strings WHERE text LIKE '%MÜ%');
SELECT lowerUTF8(text) AS LoweredText FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(text) > 5;
SELECT lowerUTF8(text) AS LoweredText FROM test_strings ORDER BY LENGTH(text) DESC;
SELECT lowerUTF8(text) AS LoweredText FROM test_strings WHERE text NOT LIKE '123%';
SELECT lowerUTF8(text) AS LoweredText, LENGTH(text) FROM test_strings;
SELECT DISTINCT lowerUTF8(text) AS DistinctLoweredText FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE other_strings (description String);
INSERT INTO other_strings VALUES ('Another TEST for lowerUTF8'), ('Touching edge CASE: LAST');
SELECT lowerUTF8(t.text) AS LoweredText, o.description FROM test_strings AS t JOIN other_strings AS o ON LENGTH(t.text) = LENGTH(o.description) ORDER BY t.text;
DROP TABLE test_strings;
DROP TABLE other_strings;
